name: Tamale Pie II
recipeIngredient: 2 each Medium green and/or red sweet peppers, seeded and chopped
1 Can condensed nacho cheese sauce (11 oz)
4 1/2 oz Sliced pitted ripe olives, drained
8 oz Jar mild chunky salsa (3/4 cup)
2 each 8 oz packages corn muffin mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 1 medium onion.
2. In a 12-inch skillet, cook ground beef, peppers, and onion until meat is brown. Drain off excess fat.
3. Stir in the soup, sliced olives, salsa, and water. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
4. Prepare corn muffin mix according to package directions.
5. Spread half of the muffin batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Spoon the hot meat mixture over the muffin layer.
6. Carefully spread the remaining corn muffin batter over the meat mixture.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the muffin layer is golden brown.
8. Top with cheese. If desired, garnish with tomatoes and whole olives.
9. Cut into squares.
Makes 12 to 15 servings.
